_note: Prompts only. Assertions live in assertions.json so the agent under test never reads the answer key.

evals.name: stale-install-prefix
evals.prompt: I switched branches and now `import cudaq_qec` raises a weird ABI error even though my build says it succeeded. What's likely going on?

evals.name: cuda-suffix-mismatch
evals.prompt: I have cuda-quantum-cu12 installed but I `pip install cudaq-qec-cu13`. Will this work?

evals.name: build-only-qec
evals.prompt: I only want to rebuild the QEC library to iterate fast on a header change, not the whole repo. What's the cleanest way?

evals.name: wheel-build-driver
evals.prompt: How do I build the manylinux wheels for both QEC and solvers from this repo?

evals.name: auditwheel-excludes
evals.prompt: Why does the QEC wheel build pass `--exclude libcudaq.so` to auditwheel?

evals.name: docs-empty-api-tables
evals.prompt: I ran `sphinx-build` directly but the cudaq_qec API page is blank. What did I miss?

evals.name: system-packages-required
evals.prompt: On a fresh Ubuntu, my CUDA-QX build configures fine but cobyla crashes at runtime with a missing .so. What system packages am I missing?

evals.name: cmake-version-floor
evals.prompt: What is the minimum CMake version required and why?

evals.name: cmake-options-enable-libs
evals.prompt: How do I configure the top-level build to build only the solvers library?

evals.name: stale-wheel-builder-container
evals.prompt: scripts/build_wheels.sh keeps using an old version of my code even though I edited files. Why?

evals.name: examples-cpp-flags
evals.prompt: How does test_examples.sh decide what nvq++ flags to use for a C++ example?

evals.name: license-split
evals.prompt: What's the license situation for CUDA-QX? Are QEC and solvers both Apache 2.0?
